title: Tech Hiring Booms in Melbourne
content: Recruiters report a 35% increase in tech-related job postings, driven by demand for AI and full-stack developers.

title: Tips for Standing Out in Job Applications
content: Career experts suggest customizing resumes for each application and leveraging personal projects during interviews.

title: Remote Work Policies Updated in Australia
content: New legislation ensures hybrid work options for eligible employees, prompting recruiters to adjust job listings accordingly.

title: Top 10 In-Demand Skills in 2025
content: Cloud computing, data analytics, and cybersecurity lead the list of most sought-after skills this year.

title: How Startups Are Attracting Talent
content: Startups are offering flexible work schedules and equity to attract skilled applicants in a competitive job market.

title: Resume Screening Tools: What Recruiters Look For
content: Most ATS tools scan for keywords in job descriptions. Tailoring your CV is now more important than ever.

title: Job Fairs to Watch This Quarter
content: Virtual and in-person job fairs are scheduled across universities in June. Great networking opportunity for job seekers.

title: Soft Skills Make a Strong Comeback
content: Companies are placing increased value on communication, adaptability, and emotional intelligence.

title: New Internship Grants Announced
content: Government to provide subsidies for companies offering internships to students and recent graduates.

title: Salary Transparency Laws Go Live
content: Recruiters are now required to include salary ranges in job postings under new transparency laws.
